detailed_consent_notes: Pt expired morning of 8/15. Surrogate consent is final consent
Pt expired afternoon of 8/18. Surrogate consent is final consent.

8/15/2022 10am - first attempt at consent with surrogate   8/19 14:10  - second attempt at consent with surrogate - asked to call back  8/23/2022 - made contact with surrogate and sent information sheet to her for her to look over  8/24/2022 - sister of patient signed consent as surrogate. Patient's name is not on the consent form, but the form was printed and added to the study files with their name written on it  9/6/2022 - pt discharged from hospital and transferred to Kaiser for continued care  9/12/2022 - 28 days since enrollment. Data will be kept

8/16/2022 14:15 - spoke with patient today about a verbal consent. He expressed he was broadly open to participating in research, but wished to go through official consent process later when he was feeling a little better. Will continue to monitor patient status to finalize consent.  8/26/2022 - pt status was monitored daily up until today, however condition continued to decline, and we were unable to undergo full consent  8/26/2022 18:34 - pt expired. A death waiver will be used

8/17/2022 10:21 - pt has no surrogate listed on file. Will collect demographics and samples on waiver and will continue to consult with care team about approaching a surrogate for consent.  8/23/2022 - made initial contact with daughter and sent her information packet materials  8/25/2022  16:45 - called and left a voicemail for patient's daughter  8/29  - attempted to call daughter again with no answer, will continue to monitor pt status to try to consent pt as well.  9/7/2022 - attempted to call one last time and left a voicemail with information and sent email information one last time. We have reached the maximum number of contact attempts for this surrogate.  9/14/2022 - we have reached the 28 day mark since patient's enrollment. His mental status has not improved enough to consent, and we reached the maximum number of consent attempts with his daughter. Data will be kept.

8/19/2022 -  daughter has expressed her mother would be interested in research, but she does not want to be contacted further about the research study or act as a surrogate. We will continue on waiver only collecting clinical samples and will monitor pt to go through full consent with her in the future.  8/28/2022 - pt expired. A death waiver will be used
8/18/2022 - pt expired shortly after data collection. A death waiver will be used

8/19 14:36 - pt samples were taken on waiver during surgery. We will attempt to consent after the weekend on Monday  8/25/2022 16:50 - called and made contact with sister. She was agreeable to the study, and we sent her an information packet.  8/29/2022 - docusign not yet completed, will reach out again to sister. Pt's status deteriorated over the past 24 hr, and we held off from contacting again on 8/29 because of the stress sister may be undergoing. resent docusign envelope 8/29 but  no response yet Will attempt to contact again.   ​8/30/2022 - patient back in ICU, chatted team to see if ok to call sister/surrogate, team recommends waiting to reach out given stressful conversations with family around transfer back to icu  9/7/2022 - checked in with team, and they said it was ok to reach out to the sister. The sister emailed Carolyn saying she was having difficulty signing the consent forms and Carolyn gave her options on how to proceed. We will await her response.  9/16/2022 - 28 days since enrollment. We have attempted to contact the patient's surrogate multiple times, we have not been able to obtain full consent. Data will be kept since 28 days have passed

8/19/22  14:00 - attempted to reach caregiver surrogate and no answer. Will continue to attempt to reach her.  8/23/2022 - we determined through talks with care team that there is no obvious surrogate for this patient. We will continue to monitor until his mental status improves.  8/25/2022 - We attempted to consent the patient, but his mental status was still altered. We will continue to monitor his status.  8/30/2022 - notes describe waxing and waning MS persists but may be improving.  Will plan to chat team on 9/1 to ask about capacity for informed consent.  9/1/2022 - we checked with the team today, and they indicated the patient was much more alert and able to be consented today. I (Caroline Hughes) approached at bedside today (9/1) to go through the informed consent documents and HIPAA form with the patient. He signed the consent in person, and these documents will be added to the study records.
pt expired 8/25/2022 - a death waiver will be used

8/24/2022 - patient admitted with no surrogate listed on file. Samples were collected on waiver  8/25/2022 - contact information for brother of patient was added to his file. We will wait until brother meets with care team to establish goals or care before we approach.   8/29/2022 - pt is following commands and has positive neuro progression, we will continue to monitor to attempt to eventually undergo full consent with him  ​  8/30/2022 - chatted w team about timeline to extubation and appropriateness to reach out to brother, no reply  8/31/2022 - pt was extubated, and his team indicated that he had positive mental status this morning and was consentable but then unfortunately reintubated, and we were not able to have a consent conversation with him. We will continue to follow his condition to attempt to consent him in person.  9/1/2022 - pt remains intubated. 9/2/2022 - pt still intubated.   9/6/2022 - pt transferred out of the hospital  9/7/2022 - made contact with pt's brother to give him information and sent him the consent form.  9/8/2022 - brother signed consent, document uploaded  9/21/2022 - 28 days have passed. Surrogate consent will be final consent and data will be kept.

8/25/2022  12:00 - pt self-assented and preferred surrogate for full consent  conducted via interpreter (Cantonese) - interpreter name: Xiao Sha Chen. Made contact with wife who was at work and will attempt to call/get in contact with her again.  8/​30/2022 - secure chatted Family Med team to see if it is ok to contact wife  but  no reply, from team.  ​8/31/2022 - team replied and advised to hold off approaching the patient or family for now because of difficult conversations.  9/1/2022 11:33 AM - pt expired, a death waiver will be used

8/25/2022 - Pt assented to research. We will attempt to contact surrogate for full consent,   8/26/2022 - patient altered and acutely agitated, care team awaiting adult son and adult daughter to reach consensus around who will be surrogate decision maker, recommended we give family time to discuss before approaching.   8/29/2022 - pt continues to remain altered, and we are still waiting for a decision maker to be determined by family. We were also advised by care team not to approach on 8/29, we will continue to monitor.  ​​​​8/30/2022 -  chatted primary team to ask about which adult child to contact for consent and no reply  9/1/2022 -  - chatted primary team again, they have still not identified a primary decision maker and advised us to continue checking in with them.  9/7/2022 - chatted team again and did not get a response of if there was a family member to contact. We will approach team in person tomorrow to get advice on who to contact.  Pt expired 9/7/22 at 17:01, a death waiver will be used.

8/29/2022 - we collected skin demographic data on waiver after consulting her care team. We were advised to wait to approach her brother until he underwent goals of care with the team that day.  8/30/2022 GOC w likely transition to comfort care.  team advised no approach given emotional conversation today.  8/31/2022 - team was checking in with family again about GOC today, 8/31. We are witholding contact until tomorrow.  Pt expired overnight on 8/31/2022, a death waiver will be used.

8/26/2022 - enrolled under waiver, no next of kin identified, ex-partner and friend overwhelmed and also not conventional decision-makers, primary team advised waiting to identify family, will follow for updates before attempting to reach out for consent   8/29/2022 - no decision makers were identified and pt remains unconsentable at this time, we will continue to monitor. ​  8/30/2022 - New surrogate added to chart, will reach out to team to see if OK to call aunt for surrogate consent  9/1/2022 - reached out to primary team, and they confirmed which of the two aunts listed on the patient's chart to reach out to for initial consent, will attempt to reach out tomorrow.   9/2/2022 - will attempt to reach out after the weekend.   9/6/2022 - brother added as primary decision maker on chart. Brother indicated that he approved of the patient's involvement in the study and would review the documents.  9/8/2022 - brother signed HIPAA form, a reminder email was sent to sign the informed consent.  9/23/2022 - 28 days have passed. surrogate consent will be final consent and data will be kept.

8/29/2022 - collected clinical sample today on waiver. Was advised by care team to wait to approach sister because she is currently overwhelmed.  8/29/2022 22:49 - pt expired, a death waiver will be used

8/29/2022 - data collected on waiver. Pt not able to undergo full consent and no surrogate listed on file.  ​8/30/2022 - patient verbally abusive to medical team, will wait to approach until calm and better rapport w providers can be established  9/1/2022 - checked with primary team, and they said patient is in a better disposition currently and able to be consented, we attempted to approach but patient was soundly sleeping and was not rousable to voice.   9/2/2022 - checked with nurses and they advised that pt would likely not want to undergo consent today because he was having a bad day. Nurse asked pt if he would be willing to speak with us and he declined. We will continue to monitor and check in.  9/6/2022 - approached patient for in person consent after checking with treatment team, and patient consented to the study

We will approach as soon as possible (either 9/23 or 9/26). ). 9/23/2022 - Approached patient, pt seems oriented and conversable, but pt declined to discuss about the research. Pt tentatively agreed to discuss on Monday (9/26/2022) after breakfast.   9/26/2022 - pt was discharged early in the morning. No phone number is listed on file.  10/4/2022 - 28 days have passed and no contact information added to file. The 28 day waiver will be used and data kept
9/6/2022 - checked with treatment team and approached patient for in person consent. Signed forms will be added to study binder.

9/9/2022 - on waiver, complex family dynamics. per neurosurgery NP, has an estranged father and foster mother that are receiving updates but not clear who is best decision maker and family dynamics are challenging.  She recommended waiting and checking in with team in several days time to see if surrogate situation is more clear, overall prognosis is grave  ​9/15/2022 - spoke with primary RN at bedside and she recommended to avoid family interaction due to communication challenges. We will keep her on waiver and check in with team in a few days, likely 9/19/2022. ​9/20/2022 - per patient's chart, her family is undergoing difficult decisions regarding end of life care and extubation today. We are holding off approaching. 9/22/2022 - checked in with charge nurse today and she continued to recommend holding off on communicating with family. She indicated that they are still having difficult conversations.

9/9/2022 - no appropriate surrogate identified per NSG NP- estranged ex girlfriend has received some updates but no appropriate for consent for research, can continue to follow to see if patient appropriate for self consent of if kin are identified

9/14/2022 - pt enrolled on waiver. Spoke with bedside RN and team has had some issues determining close family members and deciding who will be pt's decision maker. Will chat team tomorrow to see if progress has been made.  9/16/2022 - secure chatted team who said it would not be appropriate to reach out to the patient's sister at this time. 9/20/2022 made contact with grandson (primary decision maker) and explained study and sent him he consent form to sign via Docusign. He expressed that he was ok with us keeping this morning's research sample, but going forward, he would like clinical samples only for his grandfather. He indicated that he would review and sign the documents and let me know if he had any additional questions.  9/26/2022 - grandson signed the docusign consent forms. Forms were added to the Box folder. We will proceed by only collecting clinical samples in the future as the grandson indicated on our initial consent call.

​9/20/2022 we attempt to contact daughter for a consent conversation this afternoon when she was visting, but we just missed her. NP and RN indicated her family would likely consent to research, and we will attempt to contact them tomorrow, 9/21, either when they are visiting or via phone. 9/21/2022 - messaged team to make sure we were ok to approach for consent. They indicated that the patient is having some issues with her pulmonary status at the moment so the pulse ox study conversation may be distressing at the moment. They advised we check in with her team tomorrow morning. 9/22/22 - spoke with spouse and daughter at bedside in the afternoon and explained the study to them. They consented to the patient's participation in the study and signed HIPAA form and consent. We will continue to monitor the patient's status to consent her when she is oriented as well. Forms will be added to study files and uploaded to box

​9/20/2022 -RN advised holding off contacting family because it has been a complicated situation and the team is having difficult conversations with them regarding comfort care.   9/21/2022 19:27 - pt expired, a death waiver will be used

9/22/22 -  Roommate listed as DPOA on file. They recommended we hold off approaching for several days. 10/3/2022 - Pt is back on ventilation and is intubated. We will continue to monitor patient's status and will ask his care team tomorrow (10/4) to see if there's a surrogate we can approach for consent.

9/22/2022 - Dr. Greg Leeb and Caroline Hughes approached at bedside and explained the study to the patient. The patient agreed to participate and signed hard copies of the consent and HIPAA forms. These files will be added to the study binders and also uploaded to box

9/28/2022 - We called the patient's daughter after checking with the primary team to make sure it was ok to approach. The daughter said she did not want her mother participating in the study, and all data with be deleted besides patient record and the consent attempt.

9/30/2022 - approach patient at bedside and attempted to do a full consent conversation with him. He agreed for us to check back in with him on Monday (10/3). 10/3/2022 - Dr. Hendrickson and Celine approach pt at bedside, but pt said he needed more time to think it through. Will check back in with him tomorrow (10/4/2022)

9/29/2022 - patient was just admitted and samples were collected on waiver. So we decided to check back in with the team about approaching the family on Monday 10/3. 10/2/2022 - Pt. was discharged on 10/2 and transfer to UCSF for procedures.
9/29/2022 - Bedside RN advised to hold off approaching family because they are having end of life conversations.   10/1/2022 21:46 - pt expired, a death waiver will be used

9/30/22 - approached partner at bedside (after permission from bedside RN) and had a full consent conversation. Surrogate agreed to patient's participation in the study, and the ICF and HIPAA will be added to the study files. We will continue to monitor the patient's status to consent her as well

10/3/2022 - 1 research sample were collected on waiver. We will continue to monitor patient's status and will ask his care team tomorrow (10/4) to see if there's a surrogate we can approach for consent.
